scopeStatus: Review fix stayed within Phase 4 Resource ACL effective ordering and port contract.
compatStatus: Port semantics are stricter: replacement ResourceAclRepositoryPort implementations must provide findEffective instead of silently returning empty results.
retirementStatus: Retired default-empty findEffective fallback to prevent ACL enforcement bypass; no API/table retired.
newRiskSignals: DB CHECK constraints for ACL enum columns remain deferred; Java adapters enforce enum mapping.
